series_metadata.series_description: Notices of proposed settlements of federal class action lawsuits which are being submitted to court for approval. The notices describe details of the proposed settlement, estimated number of potential class members and estimated percentage of monetary entitlement per class member for Ohio. Receipt of notices gives the Attorney General's Office the opportunity to review settlement and object. File also contains internal recommendation form (per 28 USCS 1715).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: . External electronic medium, such as CDs, received by AGO can be disposed once records are saved electronically AGO network. ; Paper: , unless scanned and saved electronically
